news-global-econ.title: How to trade the SpaceX IPO in Asia's locked-out markets
news-global-econ.description: With no direct access to the IPO, traders from Seoul to Shanghai are piling into companies along the space supply chain, industry-themed ETFs and Nasdaq 100 Index-tracking funds in hopes of capturing gains

news-global-econ.title: Washington Post faces class-action lawsuit alleging 'surveillance pricing' of subscribers
news-global-econ.description: A class action lawsuit on Thursday accused the Washington Post of surveillance pricing, alleging it used subscriber data to charge loyal customers more.

news-global-soc.description:

news-global-soc.description:

news-global-soc.title: Trump pivots on strikes while dangling Iran deal, testing whether Tehran blinks
news-global-soc.description: After months of predicting a nuclear deal with Iran was just around the corner, President Donald Trump appears to be testing whether military pressure can accomplish what diplomacy alone has not.
